text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest, and plenty of
activities are being held for fans to enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Help me, Hayahideee!
choice_data_list: You seem to be in a bind...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I am! I'm in a huge bind, and I need Hayahide's help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is nearly incomprehensible in her
distress, so we follow her to find out what's going
on.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the brain strain trivia game! Make
some noise, everyone! We're about to find out
who will receive the Trivia Crown!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Biwa Hayahide. Were you entered
into this unwittingly as well?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: A-actually, yes...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry. But we do sincerely appreciate an
Umamusume of your stature joining the
proceedings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There were some issues with the equipment for
the event planned for this time slot, so a trivia
show was created to fill the gap.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see... So that's why Ticket was so desperate for
my help.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's just a little diversion until the equipment is
repaired. There's nothing to it, so let's take it
easy and enjoy ourselves, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
First question! How many courses have a turf
track with a height difference of three me—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ping!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Five. The courses with a height difference of three
meters or more are Nakayama, Kyoto, Chukyo,
Kokura, and Hakodate.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's... correct! The question was, "How many
courses have a turf track with a height difference
of three meters or more?" And the answer is five!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now, now, Teio. Audience members must
remain in their seats.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Who's the one who said we should "take this
easy" again? She's obviously playing to win!)

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf is incredible! Come on, Hayahide! You can
do it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I can't back down now, though. I don't want to
let my fans down.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahideee! You can do it! Look, I brought some
support!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I came like you asked and she saw me... So can I
leave now?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Brian?! What's she doing here?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on! She needs our support! Let's cheer
for her together! Ready, and...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Hayahideee!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What incredibly loud cheering... Oh, is that Brian?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Question number two! How long is the To—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ping!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
525.9 meters. If you're asking about the length of
the track at Tokyo Racecourse, that is.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Correct! The answer is indeed 525 meters!
Hayahide's not to be outdone with that
lightning-fast answer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe you dragged me into this, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle for the Trivia Crown rages on until,
finally, a winner is decided.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the Trivia Crown is... President
Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I knew you'd win, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're too much, Teio. Don't you need to
prepare for the next event?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... But if I'd only gotten one more
question right...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide looks frustrated and just a touch
fatigued as she lets out another sigh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe you dragged me into this, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle for the Trivia Crown rages on until,
finally, a winner is decided.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the Trivia Crown is... Biwa
Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I couldn't have done it without everyone
rooting for me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide, you nailed it! And thanks sooooo much for agreeing to join!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Goodness... Just so you know, the next time
you're in trouble, I won't agree to help before I
squeeze every last detail out of you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Also, um...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you by yourself right now?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I sure am!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But! Brian was with me until just a little while ago!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I saw her kinda smile a little when you won!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's nice to hear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide's face glows with a bashful smile.
